name: reason_codes
description: Closed registry of policy-verdict reason codes, shared by both SDKs. TS source: sdk/src/governance/reason-codes.ts (ReasonCode enum + RULE_TYPE_TO_REASON_CODE). Python twin: sdk-python/obsvr/reason_codes.py. Both SDK staleness suites (sdk/tests/unit/reason-codes.test.ts, sdk-python/tests/test_reason_codes.py) assert their registry equals `codes` here, their rule-type mapping equals `rule_type_to_reason_code`, and that the rules engine never emits a code outside `codes`. Values are stable wire strings: renaming one is a breaking change; new codes are additive. A divergence is a release blocker unless recorded in conformance/known-divergences.md.
